backend/main.mo: Main actor for the Open-Jobs platform implementing user profiles (seeker/poster), job listings, applications, ratings, analytics, and role-based access control via mixin authorization.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts job listings from old text-based jobType fields to the new variant enum type (e.g., 'fullTime' -> #fullTime), preserving all other actor state.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the replacement of 'Short-Time' job type label with 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' across six frontend files including badges, filters, and dropdowns.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of frontend source files describing key changes such as JobType enum usage, NYSC label updates, and type-safety fixes across pages and components.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS file configuring Tailwind base/components/utilities and defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the React app with the browser tab title set to 'Open-Jobs' and a root div mounting the main.tsx module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React application file defining all TanStack Router routes and the home route logic that redirects authenticated users to their role-specific dashboard or shows profile setup.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Reusable component displaying an access denied message with a configurable back-navigation button for unauthorized page access.
frontend/src/components/AdminGuard.tsx: Route guard component that restricts children to authenticated admin users, showing loading skeletons or an access denied screen otherwise.
frontend/src/components/ApplicationsList: Component that renders a list of job applications with status badges (Pending/Accepted/Rejected), loading skeletons, and an empty state.
frontend/src/components/JobFilters.tsx: Renders a sidebar filter panel for job listings with inputs for keyword, location, job type, skills (via TagInput), and a pay range slider. Exports a FilterState interface and DEFAULT_FILTERS constant.
frontend/src/components/JobListingCard.t: Displays a single job listing as a card with title, location, pay, job type badge, required skills, and conditional action buttons (edit, delete, view applicants) based on the mode prop.
frontend/src/components/LandingPage.tsx: Renders the public landing page with a hero section, feature highlights, job type badges, and a login/get-started call-to-action using Internet Identity.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Provides the app shell with a sticky header containing the logo, navigation links, and an authenticated user dropdown menu with logout and dashboard routing.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Displays an onboarding screen prompting new users to choose between a job seeker or job poster profile, navigating to the respective onboarding route on selection.
frontend/src/components/RatingDisplay.ts: Fetches and displays a user's ratings with an average star score and a list of individual reviews including comments and timestamps. Also exports a reusable StarRating component.
frontend/src/components/RatingForm.tsx: A form component that allows users to submit a star rating (1–5) and optional comment for a given reviewee, using the useSubmitRating mutation hook and displaying toast notifications on success or failure.
frontend/src/components/TagInput.tsx: An interactive tag input component that lets users add tags via Enter/comma keys or on blur, and remove them with a click, enforcing a configurable maximum tag count.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using TanStack Query, returning either an authenticated actor (with identity and admin token initialization) or an anonymous one, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider and useInternetIdentity hook for managing Internet Identity authentication via AuthClient, exposing identity state, login/clear functions, and login status flags.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all TanStack Query hooks for the backend actor, covering CRUD operations and mutations for user profiles, seeker/poster profiles, job listings, applications, ratings, and admin functions.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind CSS, and defines light/dark CSS custom properties for the design system including colors, shadows, and gradient utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with TanStack QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider into the DOM root.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboard.tsx: An admin dashboard page protected by AdminGuard that displays analytics cards and tabbed tables for managing job listings, seekers, and posters, with approve/remove/verify actions and pagination.
frontend/src/pages/JobApplicantsView.tsx: Displays a list of applicants for a specific job listing, showing seeker profiles, ratings, and application messages, with accept/reject actions and an optional rating form for the job poster.
frontend/src/pages/JobBoard.tsx: Renders a searchable, filterable job board page with a sidebar for desktop filters and a slide-out sheet for mobile, displaying job listing cards or skeleton loaders.
frontend/src/pages/JobDetailPage.tsx: Shows full details of a single job listing including poster info, skills, pay, and job type, and allows authenticated seekers to submit an application with an optional message.
frontend/src/pages/JobPostingForm.tsx: Form page for creating or editing a job listing, supporting fields like title, description, skills, location, pay, and job type, with pre-population in edit mode.
frontend/src/pages/PosterDashboard.tsx: Dashboard for job posters showing their profile, average rating, and tabbed views of active and inactive job listings with options to create, edit, deactivate, or reactivate listings.
frontend/src/pages/PosterProfileForm.tsx: A form page for creating or editing a job poster's profile, including fields for name, company name, and contact info, with navigation to the poster dashboard on success.
frontend/src/pages/SeekerDashboard.tsx: Dashboard page for job seekers displaying their profile, availability toggle, matched jobs, applications, and ratings using tabbed navigation.
frontend/src/pages/SeekerProfileForm.tsx: A form page for creating or editing a job seeker's profile, including fields for name, bio, skills, qualifications, experience, and portfolio URL.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts, OKLCH-based color tokens, border radii, box shadows, and animations, with typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking existing features and pending feature requests, primarily focused on renaming the 'Short-Time' job type label to 'NYSC (Youth Corps)' across frontend and backend.
